title: triticum repens subsp. biflorum
intro: Triticum repens subsp. biflorum, also known as wild wheat grass, is a subspecies of the triticum repens grass, which is native to various parts of Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of inflammation. The health benefits of Triticum repens subsp. biflorum include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
